productDisplayName: Spalding Men's Running White Red Shoe
description: spalding takes a step forward to show that they care for all Sports enthusiasts across the world. These extremely lightweight shoes willsuit an amateur runner as well as a pro. With its strong Trusstic system, these shoes take care both underpronators and overpronators. In case you want to add a dash of style, team it with rugged denims and a casual tee.Upper Mesh upper with synthetic stitched overlays for added durability Central lacing for customized comfortable Fit Heavily padded tongue and collar for snug fit Transparent casing of brand logo on the tongue Rubber outsole extended to the toe box and embedded onto it Extra synthetic patch over heel cup with brand logo for further addition to the structure Midsole Soft, cushioned midsole for all day step in comfort Full length phylon midsole for lightweight durability Removable sockliner to replace with an orthotic Outsole Trustic unit extended to the sides for complete inner arch support Ridges coupled with arched lugs for grip on any ground Scooped heel cup for added cushioning below the heel shoe careKeep your shoes away from the sunRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust
